title: Very Real and Not Fake Official Gameplay Overhaul Datapack
description: Definitely not made by me and very real and leaked from Mojang
body:
**NOTE: For best results, install as you would any other datapack AND use the zip file as a resource pack.**

[Disclaimer: This project is not actually made by Mojang, nor leaked from Mojang, nor even slightly related to Mojang. The description with spoilers is accurate but contains spoilers for gameplay, while the 'very real and not fake' description is completely false but will not spoil any part of the gameplay. Pick your poison.]

If anyone decides to speedrun the game with this datapack, send me a link and I will add a section for speedruns somewhere on the page. Definitely try and play it going in blind the first time, though.

<details>
<summary>DESCRIPTION W/ SPOILERS</summary>

An 'experimental gameplay overhaul' featuring mostly crafting, loot table, and block drop changes, with the goal of completely overhauling progression in a few ways. Namely:
- The Wither now must be defeated to reach the End
- Gold and Diamonds replace Blaze Rods and Ender Pearls in progression respectively, BUT can only be obtained in new, unique ways
- Bamboo
- Ores drop different items
- Brewing is now possible pre-Nether

Some other changes are made to mob loot tables to add unusual 'unique' drops and other silly items to use in your playthrough.

Check the readme file and hints folder in the zip file for more information if needed.

</details>

<details>
<summary>VERY REAL AND NOT FAKE DESCRIPTION</summary>

A very real experimental gameplay overhaul very definitely leaked from Mojang and not at all made by me in my spare time. This is definitely going to be included in 1.2X and is very real and not at all fake.

I won't go too in-depth into what this entails as that would ruin the surprise. Expect crafting changes, mob drop changes, and similar, most likely Mojang's very real and not fake attempt to overhaul combat and progression.

This datapack includes enormous overhauls to the game, and as such, you may get stuck. The zip file contains a folder titled 'hints' which contains text files of hints, separated by game 'stage'. You can use these if you find yourself in a pinch (or softlocked).
</details>
